input.instructions: Conduct a deep search in arXiv, INSPIRE-HEP, and Google Scholar for the phrase 'three universal dimensionless constants' in the context of 'classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation'. Specifically, look for papers discussing the quantum-to-classical transition of Hawking radiation. If found, extract: 1) The names/definitions of the three constants, 2) Their exact numerical values, and 3) The theoretical framework (e.g., squeezed states, Wigner functions, or photon statistics) that links them to Hawking temperature and surface gravity.

variables.search_query: three universal dimensionless constants classicality single-photon Hawking radiation

orchestration.decision_notes: The user is asking for a complex literature search across multiple academic databases (arXiv, INSPIRE-HEP, Google Scholar) to extract specific physical constants and theoretical frameworks. Since I do not have direct, real-time browsing access to these specific databases via a single tool, I must attempt to use available search/retrieval capabilities to find this specific information.
